struct DatabaseConnection {
    path: String,
}

impl DatabaseConnection {
    fn close(self) -> std::io::Result<()> {
        // GOOD: explicit async-friendly close method instead of Drop I/O
        let mut file = std::fs::File::create(format!("{}.shutdown", self.path))?;
        std::io::Write::write_all(&mut file, b"connection closed")?;
        file.sync_all()?;
        Ok(())
    }
}

impl Drop for DatabaseConnection {
    fn drop(&mut self) {
        // GOOD: Drop only releases memory, no I/O
    }
}

struct Session {
    conn: DatabaseConnection,
    data: Vec<u8>,
}
